name: Sweet/Sour Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix thoroughly ground beef, cracker crumbs, onion, egg, salt, ginger and milk.
2. Shape the mixture into balls using a rounded tablespoon.
3. Melt shortening in a large skillet; brown and cook meatballs. Remove meatballs and keep warm.
4. Pour off fat from the skillet.
5. Mix cornstarch and sugar separately.
6. Stir in the reserved pineapple syrup, vinegar and soy sauce until smooth.
7. Return to the skillet; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
8. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
9. Add meatballs, pineapple tidbits and green bell pepper; heat through.
